questionText: Disclose the percentage of your organization's Scope 3, Category 1 emissions by purchased chemical feedstock.
questionKo: Disclose the percentage of 귀사의 Scope 3, Category 1 emissions by purchased chemical feedstock.
simpleHelp: Accounting for Scope 3, Category 1 emissions from purchased feedstock can help to identify the value chain components with greatest emission reduction potential, improve GHG performance of suppliers, and inform the development of sector-specific guidance for the chemical industry.

columns.text: Percentage of Scope 3, Category 1 tCO2e from purchased feedstock
columns.textKo: Percentage of Scope 3, Category 1 tCO2e from purchased feedstock

guidance.text:
General 
Complete this table for all feedstocks that you purchased.
Figures you provide should be for the reporting year only (as defined by your answer to 1.4).
Percentage of tCO2e from purchased feedstock (column 2) 
Enter the percentage value of the CO2e emissions that the selected feedstock contributes in relation to your total Scope 3, Category 1 emissions, which you can report in question C6.5.
The sum of percentages reported here should not reach 100 unless all of Scope 3, Category 1 emissions, as reported in C6.5, are covered by the selected feedstocks.
Fuel feedstocks are also included and contribute to your Scope 3, Category 1 emissions insofar as they are consumed as feedstocks and not consumed solely for energy purposes. Upstream indirect emissions from the consumption of fuels for energy purposes is covered by Scope 3, Category 3 "Fuel- and Energy-Related Activities Not Included in Scope 1 or Scope 2".
Explain calculation methodology (column 3) 
Provide a short description of the types and sources of data used to calculate the CO2e emissions of the selected feedstock in column 1, e.g. activity data, emission factors, GWPs and sources used.
Additionally, provide a description of the methods, assumptions, and allocation methods used.
guidance.textKo: 일반 Complete this table for all feedstocks that you purchased. Figures you provide 해야 합니다 be 에 대한 보고연도 only (as defined by your answer to 1.4). Percentage of tCO2e from purchased feedstock (열 2) Enter the percentage value 의 CO2e emissions that the 선택 feedstock contributes in relation to your total Scope 3, Category 1 emissions, which you can report in 문항 C6.5. The sum of percentages 보고 here 해야 합니다 not reach 100 unless all of Scope 3, Category 1 emissions, as 보고 in C6.5, are covered by the 선택 feedstocks. Fuel feedstocks are also included 및 contribute to your Scope 3, Category 1 emissions insofar as they are consumed as feedstocks 및 not consumed solely for energy purposes. Upstream indirect emissions from the consumption of fuels for energy purposes is covered by Scope 3, Category 3 "Fuel- 및 Energy-Related Activities Not Included in Scope 1 또는 Scope 2". Explain 계산 방법론 (열 3) Provide a short description 의 types 및 sources of data used to calculate the CO2e emissions 의 선택 feedstock in 열 1, e.g. activity data, emission factors, GWPs 및 sources used. Additionally, provide a description 의 methods, assumptions, 및 allocation methods used.

guidance.text:
High Value Chemicals (Steam cracking): High value chemicals (HVCs) produced via steam cracking include ethylene, propylene from the pyrolysis gas of steam crackers, benzene (contained amounts, excluding extracted amounts), butadiene (also contained), acetylene, and hydrogen sold (as fuel).
Feedstocks: Feedstocks are starting materials, ranging from fossil fuels to biomass-based resources. These materials are fed into a process, and converted into other commodities or resources, which are either used directly or further transformed . For example, in the steel industry, coking coal is converted to coke, which is used in the steel production. In the petrochemical industry, gaseous feedstocks (ethane, propane, or butane) are used to produce high value chemicals.
Scope 3, Category 1: Purchased goods and services: The category of Scope 3 emissions, as per GHG Protocol Corporate Value Chain (Scope 3) Accounting and Reporting Standard , that includes all upstream (i.e., cradle-to-gate) emissions from the production of products purchased or acquired by the reporting company in the reporting year, not otherwise included in Categories 2 - 8. Products include both goods (tangible products) and services (intangible products).
Steam cracking: Steam cracking is the main method of breaking down large molecules of hydrocarbons, in which a gaseous or liquid hydrocarbon is diluted with steam and then heated. The main product for steam cracking process is HVCs.
guidance.textKo: High Value Chemicals (Steam cracking): High value chemicals (HVCs) produced via steam cracking include ethylene, propylene from the pyrolysis gas of steam crackers, benzene (contained amounts, 제외 extracted amounts), butadiene (also contained), acetylene, 및 hydrogen sold (as fuel). Feedstocks: Feedstocks are starting materials, ranging from fossil fuels to biomass-based resources. These materials are fed into a 프로세스, 및 converted into other commodities 또는 resources, which are either used directly 또는 further transformed. For example, in the steel industry, coking coal is converted to coke, which is used in the steel production. In the petrochemical industry, gaseous feedstocks (ethane, propane, 또는 butane) are used to produce high value chemicals. Scope 3, Category 1: Purchased goods 및 services: The category of Scope 3 배출량, as per GHG Protocol Corporate 가치사슬 (Scope 3) Accounting 및 Reporting Standard, that includes all upstream (i.e., cradle-to-gate) emissions from the production of products purchased 또는 acquired by the reporting company in the 보고연도, not otherwise included in Categories 2 - 8. Products include both goods (tangible products) 및 services (intangible products). Steam cracking: Steam cracking is the main method of breaking down large molecules of hydrocarbons, in which a gaseous 또는 liquid hydrocarbon is diluted with steam 및 then heated. The main product for steam cracking 프로세스 is HVCs.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed. Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 6/6 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 점수가 부여됩니다 per 완성된 칸(셀) in proportion to the number of 행 공개. 부분적으로 완성된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 6/6점입니다.
